introSection: Wooden Coaster - Fireball is a wooden roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Songjiang, Shanghai, China. The ride opened on 16 August 2009 along with the park. It was also the first modern wooden roller coaster in China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders per train. Trains built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.

fullText:
Wooden Coaster - Fireball is a wooden roller coaster located at Happy Valley in Songjiang, Shanghai, China. The ride opened on 16 August 2009 along with the park. It was also the first modern wooden roller coaster in China.



2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 2 rows for a total of 24 riders per train. Trains built by Philadelphia Toboggan Coasters.
